description: Sector overlay for U.S. law firms, legal practitioners, legal-service organizations, client files, trust accounts, confidentiality, conflicts, and professional-responsibility documentation.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Law and Legal. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ABA Model Rules of Professional Conduct
ABA Model Rule 1.6 Confidentiality of Information

rules.title: Client confidentiality controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for client confidentiality, privileged communication, attorney-client privilege, or unauthorized disclosure controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Competence, diligence, or supervision evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for lawyer competence, diligence, supervision, technology competence, or quality-review language.

rules.title: Conflict-of-interest screening evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for conflicts checks, waivers, informed consent, current/former client conflicts, or screening language.
